description: Create a text formatting system for Talon Voice by establishing a directory at C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\text_formatters\ containing a Python module (formatters.py) and a Talon command file (formatters.talon). The Python module must implement a Talon Module and @mod.action_class with eight functions for processing space-separated strings: format_camel_case, format_pascal_case, format_snake_case, format_screaming_snake, format_kebab_case, format_dot_case, format_title_case, and format_all_caps. The .talon file should map corresponding voice commands to these actions. Additionally, develop a standalone Python test script at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\test_formatters.py that replicates these eight formatting logic patterns. This script must be used to generate a test output file at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\formatter_test_output.txt containing the results of formatting the phrase 'open source software' using all eight styles. The output file must contain eight lines, each labeled with the format type (camel, pascal, snake, screaming, kebab, dotted, title, and allcaps) followed by the formatted result.
